creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Greetings!

Older versions (3.6?) used to install some /usr/local/etc/smb.conf and
/usr/local/etc/smb.conf.sample.

There seems to be neither some /usr/local/etc/smb4.conf nor some
/usr/local/etc/smb4.conf.sample installed by this new port.

It would be nice to provide an example. :-)

Regards,
 Kalten
